<!-- indicator: fig-educational-attainment -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-educational-attainment
#| fig-cap: 'Rate of Higher Education Attainment, 2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Rate of Higher Education Attainment, 2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-educational-attainment", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
